title: Greek Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring marinated chicken breast, paired with a hint of Greek herbs and a crispy texture.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (400°F).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
6. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Serve the skewers with a side of crispy pita chips crumbled on top.
8. Garnish with lemon wedges and fresh herbs, if desired.
